description: Memory-capped envelope validation for 32GB target (Profile A: 512 prefill, 128 decode). Produced by benchmark_moe_offload.py with --target-envelope-mb and --strict-gates. Host: 128GB Apple Silicon (synthetic cap, not hard-limited hardware).

nemotron_30b_proxy.note: 30B proxy, not 120B. Real 32GB validation requires Nemotron-H 120B checkpoint on 32GB-class hardware.
